questionHtml: Rutherford constructed a model of the atom based on the results of the alpha particle scattering experiment. Describe this model.
markschemeHtml:
«most of» the mass of the atom is confined within a very small volume/nucleus

«all» the positive charge is confined within a very small volume/nucleus

electrons orbit the nucleus «in circular orbits»

[2 marks]

meta.title: Rutherford constructed a model of the atom based on the results of the alpha particle scattering experiment. Describe this model.
